items.title: [Khukra] Stabilize local dev (skip startup sync, single DuckDB writer)
items.body: API was crashing on catalog sync and DuckDB file locks. KHUKRA_SKIP_STARTUP_SYNC=1 added to start-dev.ps1. Monitor for recurring crashes.

items.title: [Khukra] Switch DAX market data from Stooq to Yahoo Finance
items.body: Stooq returns HTML bot-check; refresh cached 0 symbols. Yahoo chart API works for .DE tickers.

items.title: [Khukra] Full-universe refresh + 15y history cap
items.body: Refresh all symbols button, KHUKRA_MAX_HISTORY_YEARS=15, longer refresh timeout.

items.title: [Khukra] Add macro regime data feeds (FRED/ECB + VSTOXX)
items.body: Suggested data source tier 1 for finance disruption/regime research. Free, high value for scenario labeling.

items.title: [Khukra] Corporate actions for .DE backtests
items.body: Dividends/splits needed for correct total-return validation on German names.

items.title: [Khukra] Expand universe beyond DAX 32 (MDAX / Euro Stoxx)
items.body: User asked about larger data swipe beyond current curated universe.

items.title: [Logistics] Scaffold khukra-logistics repo
items.body: Standalone repo with disruption/quality/resilience models, CLI, API, tests.

items.title: [Logistics] Disruption ingest + statistical discovery pipeline
items.body: FRED/Yahoo signals, refresh/discover/forecast CLI and API endpoints. Pearson/Spearman, regimes, lead-lag, composite risk.

items.title: [Logistics] Discovery cockpit UI
items.body: Browser board for catalog, refresh, insights, and composite risk charts (like Khukra finance cockpit).

items.title: [Logistics] Add port congestion + geopolitical event feeds
items.body: Next-tier disruption data sources for global risk analysis.

items.title: [Logistics] Calibrate simulation model from discovered composite risk
items.body: Bridge empirical panel to disruption_risk_forecast instead of pure synthetic paths.

items.title: [Logistics] Push repo to GitHub + link Operations board
items.body: Remote repo and GitHub Project for tracking outside chat.

items.title: [Ops] Maintain single Operations board (this manifest)
items.body: All agent suggestions go to board.manifest.json and sync to GitHub Project. Chat is not the tracker.
